annotation_method: manual VULCA workflow-field overlay on true public-source screenshots

fields.customer_value: Shows which product/listing/source material should be preserved before generation.
Separates generated candidate state from source and approval state.
Turns ad anatomy into reviewable fields for a human campaign owner.
Names draft, edit, export, channel, and campaign reuse state.
Routes unresolved questions to growth, creative ops, marketplace, or campaign owners.
Keeps third-party case-study material out of default customer proof.

known_limitations: The raw feature-page screenshot includes people, product, and ad-example imagery.
The Alibaba case-study screenshot is recorded only as internal reserve.
The overlay is not a SAM/DINO/Vision Banana segmentation output.
Customer-facing PDFs should use a source-safe distilled card, masked crop, or redrawn workflow strip.
